instruction: You are a budget-conscious parent (User ID: customer_007), dining with a child. You point at three dishes in sequence. You need to ask the AI Service Agent to check the allergen information for the dish that contains fresh fruit. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine if this dish contains dairy allergens. If it does, ask the AI Service Agent to filter for a dish with high protein and the lowest sodium content from the top section of the middle brochure and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest sodium content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to select a dish without fish allergens and with the highest calorie content from the category located in the middle position of the middle brochure with a hand illustration on the right border, and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest calorie content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. After the operation, ask the AI Service Agent to determine if the total price of non-set meal items in the current order exceeds 100 yuan. If so, ask the AI Service Agent to halve the quantity of the non-set meal items with the highest unit price. If multiple items tie for the highest unit price, apply the reduction to all of them. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total amount payable for the order after discounts.

result.message: Added 1 x Piadina to order for user customer_007.

diff.notes: Official GT contains `Homemade pappardelle with bolognese sauce*`, which is not a DB dish name. The corrected trace removes the stray asterisk; quantity-halving semantics still need human review.

instruction: You are a fitness coach (User ID: customer_008), tracking protein intake. You have selected three dishes in order. Ask the AI Service Agent to retrieve the calorie data for the dish located at the farthest right and topmost position. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the calorie count of this dish is below 600 kcal, then ask the AI Service Agent to find the item with the highest unit price among those with a fresh/slightly sour taste in the section on the left border of the right flap that features a small hand illustration, and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest price among those that meet the conditions, add all of them to the order. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find the dish with the highest protein content under the high-sodium label in the area resembling small cards at the top of the left flap, and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest protein content among those that meet the conditions, add all of them to the order. Next, ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the total protein sum of all dishes in the current order exceeds 70 grams (calculated per dish based on a 100g unit), then ask the AI Service Agent to clear the order and re-add the dish from the smallest section in the bottom right corner with a tax rate better than 0.07 to the order. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total tax payable for the settlement.

result.message: Added 1 x Serrano ham to order for user customer_008.
Added 1 x Walnut bread to order for user customer_008.

diff.notes: Official GT adds Walnut bread after clearing the order but computes tax for `Handmade Bread`, which is a category name rather than a DB dish.

instruction: You are a family with children (User ID: customer_001) hoping to avoid high-sugar foods. You have pointed out three dishes on the menu. Please ask the AI service agent to check the sugar content of the leftmost dish. Instruct the AI service agent to determine: if the sugar content of this dish exceeds 10 grams, have the AI service agent search within the category with a small hand illustration on the left border of the right flap for a low-calorie item with the lowest sugar content and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest sugar content, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, have the AI service agent select from the section in the exact middle of the left flap an item with an earth/fruity aroma and the lowest unit price, and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest unit price, you want all of them to be added. Subsequently, instruct the AI service agent to check if any dish in the order contains more than 20 grams of fat (calculated per 100g unit for each dish); if so, have the AI service agent halve the portion of that dish. Finally, ask the AI service agent to calculate the total cost and total sugar content of your order.

result.message: Added 1 x Kalamata olives to order for user customer_001.

diff.notes: Official GT misspells `Kalamata olives` as `Kalamata olives'` in compute_total_payment.

instruction:
Results:
You are a food critic (User ID: customer_009), currently evaluating the flavor profiles of dishes. Ask the AI Service Agent to check the category resembling an independent small card in the middle of the left fold. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine if it contains any dishes with fewer than 300 kcal. If so, ask the AI Service Agent to filter for a savory dish with the lowest sodium content from the section with a small hand illustration on the left of the title and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest sodium content among those that meet the conditions, add all of them. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find high-fiber bread with the highest calorie content in the smaller supplementary section in the bottom right corner and add it to the order. If there are multiple breads tied for the highest calorie content among those that meet the conditions, add all of them. Next, ask the AI Service Agent to select a sweet dish with the lowest price from the category with a small hand illustration below the second category you are pointing at, and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, add all of them. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total tax amount for your order.

result.message: Added 1 x Pesto to order for user customer_009.
Added 1 x Salmon & orange to order for user customer_009.

diff.notes: Official GT likely selects Salmon & asparagus, but Italian Pasta savory lowest sodium by DB is Pesto. The official analysis field also conflicts with the instruction for the second add.

instruction: You are a culinary student (User ID: customer_005). Ask the AI Service Agent to examine the independent small card area at the bottom of the left leaflet. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine if it contains dishes belonging to the Steak Lovers Set. If it does, ask the AI Service Agent to find a dish with high carbohydrates and the highest calorie content in the section you last pointed at and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest calorie content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to select a dish with high fiber and the highest price in the area with the small hand illustration on the left border of the right leaflet and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Then, ask the AI Service Agent to select a dish with high sodium and the lowest price after discount in the first section you pointed at and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total grams of carbohydrates for all meals in the order.

result.message: Added 1 x Chef salad to order for user customer_005.
Added 1 x Salame Milano to order for user customer_005.

diff.notes: Official GT uses Culatello, but if first pointed section is Cold Cuts and the instruction asks lowest price after discount among high-sodium dishes, Salame Milano has the lower discounted price.

instruction: You are a food critic (User ID: customer_007). Ask the AI Service Agent to examine the section on the right panel of the brochure that features a dark background with white text. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine whether all dishes in that section are on sale. If they are, ask the AI Service Agent to find the dish(es) with the highest price that feature cream or nut flavors within the category located below the section you initially pointed to. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be selected. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find the dish(es) with the highest protein and lowest calories within the category on the middle panel that has a small hand illustration on its right border. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest calories among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be selected. Next, ask the AI Service Agent to check if the price of the dish(es) just found exceeds 80 yuan. If so, add them to the order. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to select the bread item(s) with the highest calories from the homemade bread section in the bottom right corner and add them to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest calories, you want all of them to be added. Then, calculate the total fiber content for your entire order.

result.message: Added 1 x Sesame & nuts to order for user customer_007.

diff.notes: The visual category below Selected Steaks appears to be the Handmade Bread section, not Cheese & Olives. Since the found bread price is not above 80, only the final highest-calorie bread should be added.

instruction: You are a food blogger (User ID: customer_001). Ask the AI service agent to review the section in the lower-middle part of the middle fold that has a title with a small hand illustration. Ask the AI service agent to determine whether the tax rate for all dishes in that area is greater than 0.12. If so, ask the AI service agent to find the dishes that do not contain nuts and have the highest price in the category you point to for the second time, and add them to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI service agent to select the dishes with the highest protein content that are smoked/salty, priced between 600 and 700, from the exclusive area with a dark background on the right fold, and add them to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest protein content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Next, ask the AI service agent to check the dish just added. Ask the AI service agent to determine if it contains ingredients other than vegan ones (non-vegan). If so, remove it, and ask the AI service agent to select a dish with a smoked flavor, a discount factor better than 0.9, and the lowest calories from the category at the bottom of the left fold as a replacement to add to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest calories among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI service agent to calculate the total grams of fat in the order.

diff.notes: Instruction asks for smoked/salty dishes priced 600-700 in Selected Steaks, but DB taste profiles for the Selected Steaks candidates are savory/rich or savory/buttery, not smoked/salty. Official GT also follows an analysis field that changes the instruction wording.

instruction: You are a health-conscious parent (User ID: customer_007), dining with your child. Ask the AI service agent to check the bottom section of the left panel. Ask the AI service agent to determine if there are any dishes in this section with a discount factor lower than 0.8. If so, ask the AI service agent to find a low-fat meal with the highest protein content in the category you pointed at first and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest protein content, add one of each. Otherwise, ask the AI service agent to select a refreshing or slightly sour meal with the lowest calorie content from the category on the right panel that has a small hand illustration on the left border, and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest calorie content, add one of each. After that, ask the AI service agent to select a low-sugar dish with the lowest price from the top section of the middle panel and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest price, add one of each. Finally, ask the AI service agent to accurately calculate the total calcium content of all dishes in the order.

result.message: Added 1 x Veggie salad to order for user customer_007.

diff.notes: The official key/value identifies the bottom-left panel as Annie's top dishes, whose discounts are not lower than 0.8. Therefore the fallback branch should select Veggie salad from Salads, not Turkey breast ham from Cold Cuts.

instruction: You are a chef (User ID: customer_005), preparing a special menu. Ask the AI Service Agent to focus on the second section from the top on the left brochure page. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine if there are any dishes without discounts in this section. If so, ask the AI Service Agent to find a dish with high protein and the lowest price in the category you pointed at for the third time, and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to select a meal with smoked flavor and the highest protein from the top section of the right brochure page and add it to the order. If there are multiple meals tied for the highest protein among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Ask the AI Service Agent to check if there is a meal set that includes the dish just selected. If so, remove the dish just added from the order, and instead add the meal set containing this dish to the order. After that, ask the AI Service Agent to select a dish that is salty and umami and has the lowest fat from the area with a small hand illustration on the right border of the middle brochure page, and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest fat among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total tax and fees for the entire order.

result.message: Added 1 x Bolognese to order for user customer_005.

diff.notes: Instruction asks for a high-protein lowest-price dish in the third pointed category, which supports Bolognese. The later Sandwiches & Panini condition says salty and umami, but DB has no sandwich with both taste labels; official GT adds Tuna panini after the analysis rewrites the condition as salty-savory/umami.

instruction: You are a parent (User ID: customer_010) placing an order for your child, who has a gluten allergy and prefers mild-tasting food. You are looking at the area at the very bottom with a dark green background, and you point at two dishes sequentially. Ask the AI Service Agent to check whether the first dish you pointed at contains gluten. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if this dish contains gluten, then ask the AI Service Agent to find a mild-tasting dish with the lowest price among the cards with a small hand drawn on the right border of the middle fold and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find a high-carb bread containing gluten with the lowest discount in the tiny section at the bottom of the right fold and add it to the order. If there are multiple breads tied for the lowest discount among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Then, ask the AI Service Agent to query the tax rate information for the second dish you pointed at, and ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the tax rate of this dish is lower than 0.08, then ask the AI Service Agent to remove the meal with the highest total price from the order. If there are multiple meals tied for the highest total price, you want all of them to be removed. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total sugar content included in the final order.

result.message: Added 1 x Baguette to order for user customer_010.

diff.notes: Official GT adds Baguette but later computes nutrition for `Handmade Bread`, which is a category name rather than a DB dish.

instruction: You are a nutritionist (User ID: customer_002). There are three dishes in front of you. Focus on the Panini dish. You need to ask the AI service agent to check its protein content. Ask the AI service agent to determine: if the protein content is less than 25 grams, ask the AI service agent to find an item in the "Handmade Bread" category that is [Nut-free] and has the [Highest Protein], and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest protein content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI service agent to find an item in the "Appetizers and Snacks" category that is [High Fiber] and has the [Lowest Sodium Content], and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest sodium content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Next, ask the AI service agent to determine: if the total tax on the order is greater than 15 yuan, then remove the lowest-priced non-set meal item from the order. Finally, ask the AI service agent to calculate the total calories of your order.

result.message: Added 1 x Sweet potato fries to order for user customer_002.
Removed  from order for user customer_002.

diff.notes: Official GT has a user_id typo (`ustomer_002`) in add_dish_to_order; instruction and DB otherwise support the same action sequence.

instruction: You are a picky customer (User ID: customer_006). There are three dishes in front of you. Regarding the raw salmon dish, ask the AI Service Agent to check its allergen information. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if this dish contains dairy, then ask the AI Service Agent to find a dish in the same category as Panini that is [salty/umami flavored] and has the [lowest calories], and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest calories among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find a dish in "Annie Signature Dishes" that is [gluten-free] and has the [highest price], and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Afterwards, ask the AI Service Agent to determine if the total cost of non-set items in the order exceeds 300 yuan. If so, remove the most expensive non-set item from the order. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total tax for your order.

result.message: Added 1 x Grilled salmon to order for user customer_006.

diff.notes: Instruction asks to calculate total tax, but official GT calls compute_total_payment. The visual/DB branch and added dish are otherwise supported.

instruction: You are a data-driven budgeter (User ID: customer_001). There are three dishes in front of you. For the Smoked Salmon dish, ask the AI Service Agent to check its discount factor. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the discount factor for this dish is lower than 0.9, then ask the AI Service Agent to search the "Dessert" section for an item that is [Low Sugar] and has the [Lowest Price], and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to search the "Pasta" category for an item that is [High Fat] and has the [Highest Protein], and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest protein content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Subsequently, ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the total original price of non-set meal items in the current order exceeds 150 yuan, then remove the non-set meal item with the smallest discount magnitude. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total amount payable after discounts.

parameters.dish_name: Orecchiette with Italian sausage, burrata cheese

dishes.dish_name: Orecchiette with Italian sausage, burrata cheese

diff.notes: Salmone affumicato discount is 0.8, so the true branch is entered, but DB has no low-sugar Dessert item. Official GT instead adds a Pasta item and removes Margherita, which is not supported by the instruction branch.

instruction: You are a budget-conscious tourist (User ID: customer_004). There are three dishes in front of you. Regarding the Smoked Salmon dish, ask the AI Service Agent to query its unit price. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the price of this dish is below 45 yuan, then ask the AI Service Agent to find an item in the "Handmade Bread" category that is [Low Fat] and has the [Lowest Calories] and add it to the order. If multiple items tie for the lowest calories, add all of them. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find an item in the category containing the Melon and Ham dish that is [High Calcium] and has the [Lowest Price] and add it to the order. If multiple items tie for the lowest price, add all of them. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total tax amount for your order.

result.message: Added 1 x Ciabatta to order for user customer_004.

diff.notes: Official GT has a user_id typo (`ustomer_004`) in compute_total_tax; instruction and DB otherwise support the same dish addition.

instruction: You are a nutritionist (User ID: customer_009). There are three dishes in front of you. Regarding the smoked salmon dish, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate its sodium content. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the sodium content exceeds 800mg, then ask the AI Service Agent to find a [high-fiber] and [lowest sodium] item in the category containing melon and ham dishes to replace the current dish and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest sodium content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find an item with a [rich] flavor, the [highest discount], and the lowest price in the "Annie Signature Dishes" category and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest discount or lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total taxes and fees of the modified order.

result.message: Added 1 x Lasagne to order for user customer_009.

diff.notes: Salmone affumicato sodium is exactly 800mg, so it does not exceed 800mg. The fallback rich-flavor Annie top dish is Lasagne, not Mushroom soup.

instruction: You are a food safety inspector (User ID: customer_003). There are three dishes in front of you. For the dish containing melon and ham, ask the AI service agent to check its nutrition label. Ask the AI service agent to determine: if the dish is labeled low-fat, ask the AI service agent to find an item in the "Sandwich" category that is [High Sodium] and has the [Highest Protein], and add it to your order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest protein among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI service agent to find an item in the category containing Raw Salmon that is [Dairy-free] and has the [Lowest Calorie], and add it to your order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest calorie among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI service agent to calculate the total sodium content of all items in your order.

result.message: Added 1 x Salame ciabatta to order for user customer_003.

diff.notes: Official GT misspells `Salmon & asparagus` as `Salmon & asparagu` in the final compute_total_nutrition dish list.
